overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 first-person gameplay footage exploring a neon-lit futuristic urban plaza at night. The player walks through a commercial district with holographic advertisements, transitions via escalator to an elevated walkway, and overlooks a multi-level highway with moving traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza towards corporate buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for MAXIWEAR on building facade
tall corporate building with ZETATECH signage and red circular logo
rectangular planters with glowing cyan neon edges
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban plaza at night, dominated by the MAXIWEAR billboard ahead and the ZETATECH building to the right. The ground is wet and reflective, with neon-edged planters and palm trees creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. The player walks forward through this commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with vehicle display and corporate advertisements

events.description: passing by a futuristic car display platform with several onlookers gathered around

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past a vehicle display and advertisement walls

notable_agents.action: standing near the car display platform observing the vehicle

entered.detail: raised platform with a futuristic vehicle and glowing accent lights
wall-mounted advertisements with PURE OVERKILL text and orange graphics

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the plaza, passing a futuristic car on a display platform where NPCs are gathered. The PURE OVERKILL advertisements line the left wall as the MAXIWEAR billboard falls behind and the ZETATECH building recedes into the distance.

events.description: ascending escalator from ground plaza to elevated walkway level
view opens to reveal the multi-level highway below with moving vehicle lights

agents.ego_description: riding the escalator upward while looking out at the expanding city view

entered.detail: moving staircase with glass sides ascending to upper level
multi-level highway system visible below with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The player ascends an escalator, transitioning from the ground plaza to an elevated walkway. As the camera rises, the view opens to reveal a sprawling multi-level highway below with cars moving along the roads, and the surrounding glass towers become more prominent.

events.description: reaching the top of the escalator and continuing forward along the elevated path

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway overlooking the highway traffic below

notable_agents.action: leaning against the railing looking down at the highway traffic

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with reflective wet flooring and neon accents
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and cyan neon trim
connecting bridge with glowing cyan light strips spanning across the highway

segments.scene_description: Now on the elevated walkway, the player moves along a path overlooking the busy highway below. The glass office towers rise on the right with cyan neon lighting, while other pedestrians walk by and one leans on the railing to watch the traffic. The scene maintains the wet, reflective cyberpunk aesthetic with the city lights shimmering on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial plaza that ascends into a panoramic view of a multi-level futuristic highway. It begins by moving across wet, reflective pavement beneath a massive MAXIWEAR billboard and the ZETATECH building, passing through a district filled with neon-edged planters and palm trees. As the camera pushes deeper into the plaza, it glides past a futuristic car on a display platform and PURE OVERKILL advertisements before the initial buildings recede into the distance. The scene then shifts upward as the player ascends an escalator, transitioning from the ground level to an elevated walkway where the view opens to reveal a sprawling network of highways and moving traffic below. Finally, the camera moves along this high path, flanked by cyan-lit glass office towers and pedestrians, while the city lights continue to shimmer on the damp surfaces of the walkway.
